description1: Website created to promote the services of a clinical psychologist in private practice. Website project carried out from the creation of the website design to the deployment on the internet.
task1_1: Design of interactive prototype on Figma
task1_2: Development of the website and its mobile responsive design
task1_3: Use of MUI, library of user interface components
task1_4: Implementation of emailJS library for sending email
title2: Implementation of an online food platform in React JS
description2: Development of a front-end online food platform. Project carried out during my internship for the last year of my professional bachelor's degree in La Rochelle (France).
task2_1: Development of the website and its mobile responsive design
task2_2: Development by accessing data via a REST services architecture.
task2_3: Maintenance, improvement and Implementation of new features on the site.
task2_4: Use of MUI, library of user interface components
description3: Development of my portfolio that will follow me throughout my working life. Coded in React JS - typescript with the MUI component library. Future improvement: Added a back office with an admin interface to add or remove features on my portfolio
task3_1: Design of interactive prototype on Figma
task3_2: Development of the website and its mobile responsive design
task3_3: Configuration of the site in multilingual (French - English)
task3_4: Use of MUI, library of user interface components
task3_5: Implementation of emailJS library for sending email
title4: Mobile app - Management of renovation works
description4: Mobile application to help the citizens of a French city to manage their renovation works. Developed in Flutter (Final Degree Project)
task4_1: Design of interactive prototype on Figma
task4_3: Developement of a prototype version of the website in Flutter
